---
title: "People"
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.person-card}

![Louis Leblond](images/people/louis-leblond.jpg)

::: {.person-info}
### Louis Leblond

**Teaching Professor in Physics & Director of Online Education**, Penn State University

The long-term objective of his education research program is to help students become better self-directed learners while they experience an education system that is fun, rewarding, inclusive and equitable. He's always looking for collaborators to learn from and work with!

[Email Louis](mailto:lul29@psu.edu){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

:::

## Current Students

::: {.person-card}

![Jude Sullivan](images/people/jude-sullivan.jpg)

::: {.person-info}
### Jude Sullivan

**Graduate student in Psychology and Women's, Gender, and Sexuality Studies**

Current project: Barriers and enablers for non-traditional adult learners in asynchronous physics courses.
:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Ashlyn Leary](images/people/ashlyn-leary.jpg)

::: {.person-info}
### Ashlyn Leary

**Undergraduate student, Lehigh University** -- Physics, Sociology, and Data Science minor

Current project: Barriers and enablers for non-traditional adult learners in asynchronous physics courses.
:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Tyler Lowman](images/people/tyler-lowman.jpg)

::: {.person-info}
### Tyler Lowman

**Graduate student in Physics**

Current project: Study of the Qualifying Exam Change Process
:::

:::

## Former Students

::: {.person-card}

![Julian Mintz](images/people/julian-mintz.jpg)

::: {.person-info}
### Julian Mintz

**M.Sc. 2026 (co-advisor with Eric Hudson)**

:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Heer Patel](images/people/heer-patel.jpeg)

::: {.person-info}
### Heer Patel

**Undergraduate student, Penn State University**

:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Meghan Ishler](images/people/meghan-ishler.png)

::: {.person-info}
### Meghan Ishler

**B.Sc. 2025**, Physics and Mathematics

Now: Graduate student in Mathematics Education at New Hampshire University. Project: Impact of learning strategies in online versus in-person courses.
:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Emma Koller](images/people/emma-koller.png)

::: {.person-info}
### Emma Koller

**B.Sc. 2020**, Physics and Astrophysics

Project: Study of efficacy of hands-on laboratories in online courses.
:::

:::

::: {.person-card}

![Mar Alegre](images/people/mar-alegre.png)

::: {.person-info}
### Mar Alegre

**M.S. 2019**

Work on attitude surveys in introductory physics courses. ANOVA analysis combining CLASS, modified FCI and course grade.
:::

:::
